corrections_by_claim.note: The article reports on the production of chips, but does not analyze the nature of the investment (productive vs. rent-seeking) as required by the theory map.
No engagement with the mechanism of search indexing or data extraction.

While the article describes state-led industrial policy in China, it does not engage with the theoretical claim that the state is constitutive of the mode of production or the 'parcelized sovereignty' debate.
No discussion of profit rates or the Marxist theory of surplus value.
Mentions physical hardware, but provides no balance-sheet analysis of tangible vs. intangible assets.
No engagement with the meta-theoretical debate on capitalism vs. feudalism.
